sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80476" key="pe/lic" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πέλιξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ικος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n80476.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κύλιξ</ref> </xr> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προχοΐδιον</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
